error.locked_timed: Account is locked. Try again in {minutes} minute(s).
error.locked_manual: Account is locked. Contact an administrator.

settings.max_attempts_help: Number of consecutive failed login attempts before an account is locked.
settings.lockout_mode_help: Timed: auto-unlocks after duration. Manual: requires admin/moderator to unlock.
settings.lockout_duration_help: How long accounts stay locked. Only applies when lockout mode is set to Timed.

users.unlock_confirmation: Are you sure you want to unlock {username}?

unlock_modal.title: Unlock {username}
unlock_modal.manually_locked: This account is manually locked and requires an admin or moderator to unlock it.

log_in.locked_timed: This account has been locked due to too many failed login attempts. Please try again in {minutes} minute(s).
log_in.locked_manual: This account has been locked. Please contact an administrator.
log_in.attempts_remaining: Invalid credentials. {remaining} of {max} login attempt(s) remaining before your account is locked.
